title: ECB Annual Report 2024 - Landing Page
summary: Landing/navigation page for ECB Annual Report 2024 containing only summary statistics (2.4% inflation, -100bp rate cuts to 3.00% deposit facility rate) and links to the full report. No substantive policy analysis present.
key_points: Headline inflation declined to 2.4% in December 2024 from 2.9% in December 2023, moving closer to the 2% target
ECB cut interest rates four times in 2024, cumulative reduction of 100 basis points
Deposit facility rate reached 3.00% by end of 2024
ECB Visitor Centre hosted 21,325 visitors in 2024
Page is a container/navigation page linking to full report and related documents
why_it_matters: This page has no independent archive value - it is merely a navigation hub to the actual report, speech, and financial accounts. The summary statistics are verifiable but too thin to constitute a useful research record.
macro_context: ECB cut rates 100 basis points across four meetings in 2024, reducing deposit facility rate to 3.00%, while headline inflation declined from 2.9% to 2.4%. These are summary metrics only, not substantive policy analysis.

issues_found: Source is a container/landing page, not the actual report content - contains only summary statistics and navigation links
URL is blank - source cannot be verified or revisited
Lacks substantive policy analysis - only high-level summary metrics present
Archive value is too low - no actual ECB policy analysis or detailed assessment
Rule 8 violation: source is a landing page/navigation page which must not be accepted
Published_at date (2024) refers to the report year, not the page publication date

notes: Container/navigation page. Confirmed via DOMAIN_TRUST_TIER: high and crawl discovery method. Source quality is thin - contains only summary metrics and navigation links. Actual report content not present. Confidence lowered due to lack of substantive analysis and missing URL. The numbers (2.4% inflation, -100bp rate cuts, 3.00% deposit rate) are explicitly stated in the source and verifiable against ECB policy history.
